threshold_expression: If the patient reports chest pain, immediately escalate to emergency protocol.
source_quote: If the patient reports chest pain, immediately escalate to emergency protocol.

threshold_expression: If the patient reports mild headache, proceed to standard assessment.
source_quote: If the patient reports mild headache, proceed to standard assessment.

threshold_expression: If the patient has a known allergy to penicillin, flag the chart accordingly.
human_label: the patient has a known allergy to penicillin
source_quote: If the patient has a known allergy to penicillin, flag the chart accordingly.

threshold_expression: If pain level is greater than 7, administer analgesic per standing order.
source_quote: If pain level is greater than 7, administer analgesic per standing order.

threshold_expression: If pain level is between 4 and 6, offer over-the-counter options.
source_quote: If pain level is between 4 and 6, offer over-the-counter options.

threshold_expression: If pain level is less than 4, continue monitoring.
source_quote: If pain level is less than 4, continue monitoring.

threshold_expression: If the patient requires surgical intervention, refer to the surgical consent module.
source_quote: If the patient requires surgical intervention, refer to the surgical consent module.

threshold_expression: If the patient requires only medication management, proceed to the pharmacy coordination module.
human_label: the patient requires only medication management
source_quote: If the patient requires only medication management, proceed to the pharmacy coordination module.

threshold_expression: If the patient is over 65 years old and has multiple comorbidities, initiate the geriatric care coordination pathway.
human_label: the patient is over 65 years old and has multiple comorbidities
source_quote: If the patient is over 65 years old and has multiple comorbidities, initiate the geriatric care coordination pathway.

threshold_expression: If the patient is under 18, ensure guardian consent is obtained.
source_quote: If the patient is under 18, ensure guardian consent is obtained.
